src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old AsyncSpringLiquibase constructor is no longer available; the new utility method is required to create the bean correctly.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
SpringLiquibase liquibase = new AsyncSpringLiquibase(executor, env);
        liquibase.setDataSource(dataSource);
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
SpringLiquibase liquibase = SpringLiquibaseUtil.createAsyncSpringLiquibase(
            this.env,
            executor,
            liquibaseDataSource.getIfAvailable(),
            liquibaseProperties,
            dataSource.getIfUnique(),
            dataSourceProperties
        );
